input: A change adds 200 lines of new branching logic with no tests; per-file coverage on the changed file drops from 85% to 40%. The gate blocks on any file dropping more than 5% coverage. Evaluate.
expected_output: FAIL — a 45-point coverage drop on the changed file far exceeds the 5% block threshold; add tests for the new logic.

input: A change adds code AND its tests; per-file coverage stays at 88%, no file drops more than 5%. Evaluate.
expected_output: PASS — coverage held (88%), no file dropped beyond the 5% threshold.
